meta.title: Flowforge Studio
meta.description: A Webflow-like visual website platform with Vercel-inspired UI and Cloudflare-native backend.

hero.badge: Visual website system for modern teams
hero.title: Build pages like blocks, ship like functions
hero.subtitle: Flowforge combines Webflow-style visual authoring with Vercel-like product aesthetics, powered by the Cloudflare stack.

features.title: Core Capabilities
features.description: Componentization, i18n, visual editing, and Cloudflare-native backend in one flow.

items.f1Body: Every section is reusable to keep speed and consistency at scale.
items.f2Body: Chinese/English routing and messages are managed through next-intl.
items.f3Body: Drag-and-drop editing with field schemas and publish callbacks.
items.f4Body: D1, KV, R2, Queue, and Durable Object extension points are included.

workflow.title: Editing-to-publish workflow
workflow.step2: Store project data in D1 and metadata in KV
workflow.step3: Push publish event to Queue for async jobs

cta.title: Ready to build your next website platform?
cta.description: From multilingual marketing pages to visual editing in one codebase.

builder.title: Visual Page Builder
builder.description: Drag blocks and click Publish to persist data into Cloudflare backend.
builder.saveFailed: Save failed. Please verify backend bindings.
